name: Mother's Oh and Ah! Cake
recipeIngredient: 2 1/2 cups Sifted cake flour (sifted before measuring)
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: St. Louis Post-Dispatch, 3/18/96
Grease and flour a 13-by-9-by-2 1/2-inch pan or three 8-inch cake pans. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
Combine chocolate and hot water; stir until chocolate melts. Let cool, then add food coloring and baking soda. Stir and set aside.
In a large mixing bowl, beat sugar, salt, eggs, and shortening until fluffy. Mix in one-third of the flour, then one-third cup sour cream; repeat twice. Add chocolate mixture; beat about 2 minutes on medium speed of mixer.
Pour batter into prepared pans. Bake for 45 minutes in a 13-by-9-inch pan (less for cake pans) or until a toothpick inserted near the center comes out clean. Remove from pans and let cool on a rack before frosting.
